product.title: Natural Glow - Ideal for Light/Medium Complexions,Luvie Glow Foundation, Mushroom Head Air Cushion CC Cream - BB Cream Foundation for Older Women(Natural)
featureBullets: 【Gentle & Nourishing for Mature/Sensitive Skin】 Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and Dimethicone, this cushion foundation caters to sensitive, dry, or mature skin types, effectively preventing caking and creasing while delivering long-lasting comfort.

【Warm Golden Shade for Light-Medium Complexions】A perfect warm-neutral tone that complements light to medium skin with golden or olive undertones, evening out uneven skin tone for a refreshed, natural-looking finish.

【All-Day Hydrating Skincare Formula】Infused with moisture-locking Hyaluronic Acid, it keeps skin supple and hydrated throughout the day, maintaining a healthy, radiant complexion without drying out the skin.

【Lightweight Buildable Coverage (No Heavy Feeling)】The lightweight cushion formula blends seamlessly for buildable coverage, blurring fine lines and texture imperfections without feeling greasy or settling into fine lines.

【Effortless Application with Mushroom Puff】Comes with a soft mushroom-shaped puff for quick, streak-free application—ideal for daily makeup routines and on-the-go touch-ups, creating a flawless base in seconds.

specification.value: Color Correction, Corrects Imperfections, Firming, Hydrating
#18,499 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #188 in Foundation Makeup
Dye Free, Fragrance Free, Paraben Free, Alcohol Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides great natural coverage that doesn't accentuate fine lines and wrinkles, while being lightweight and easy to apply. They appreciate its luminous finish, soft texture, and how it leaves skin soft throughout the day. The foundation matches colors well and exceeds expectations in terms of quality.

reviews.reviewText: I absolutely loved this foundation! The Hush Makeup Foundation exceeded my expectations. It has a lightweight, cushion-like texture that applies very easily with the sponge, leaving the skin with a natural, luminous finish. It covers imperfections without feeling heavy or cakey.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Great coverage ease of application with brush. Smooth finish. Does not smudge.
reviews.reviewText: This lives up to all it claims. Good quality. Cover and color fantastic. Stays on and doesn’t smudge. It alone does not cover dark spots completely. But finish is smooth. Brush application makes is better than sponge or finger I will buy again and again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is from product details- Material Type Free: Dye Free, Fragrance Free, Paraben Free, Alcohol Free It is not, however, fragrance free. Instantly gave me a rash. I would disagree with the claims that this product is good for sensitive skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Nice coverage, wish it was a little easier to apply.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Acabado natural y luminoso perfecto para el cutis
reviews.reviewText: Natural and luminous finish, it feels light and blurs very well, achieving a uniform tone without looking heavy. It's perfect for my complexion because it moisturizes and leaves the skin soft during the day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This product does not provide much coverage, not even as much as my tinted moisturizer. Also, the applicator broke the first time I used it. Too much hype and too little quality.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It's awfully light and it didn't change my face like it does (in pictures) for so many. It's not heavy and I'll see how it wears for the day. Follow-up Best part of the product was, it did not settle and cake up in lines or wrinkles! Didn't cover them up but didn't settle in them!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Great product for a low price
reviews.reviewText: I love the easy process to use it. Blends perfect with my skin color. Duration, impressive. Last for me more than 24 hour. I know I need to wash my face before going to sleep but I was too tired. In the morning was looking marvelous. No tranaferr to my pillow.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 4, 2026
